---
title: "Love and Life: An Old Story in Eighteenth Century Costume. 2 vols."
---

## Love and Life: An Old Story in Eighteenth Century Costume. 2 vols.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1880
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
